name: Slice-And-Bake Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Combine flour, baking soda, and salt; stir well. Set aside.
Cream shortening; gradually add sugars, beating at medium speed of an electric mixer. Add eggs and vanilla, mixing well. Stir in the flour mixture, mixing well. Stir in oats and pecans. Shape dough into two 12-inch rolls. Wrap in wax paper, and chill at least 6 hours.
Unwrap rolls, and cut into 1/4-inch slices. Place on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake at 375 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool on wire racks. Yield: about 7 dozen.
Note: Dough may be frozen up to 3 months. Slice dough while frozen, and bake at 375 degrees for 12 minutes.
